global_tooltips.email: EBI requires an email address for remote jobs
global_tooltips.input_file: Protein sequence as FASTA (.fa/.fasta) or an AlphaFold PDB (.pdb). PDB input auto-extracts the sequence and pre-fills the pLDDT analysis.
global_tooltips.input_genomic: FASTA of genomic region containing gene (include at least 500bp up- and downstream)
global_tooltips.run_name: Short identifier used as the prefix for all output files
global_tooltips.working_dir: Directory for output. Autocompleted from Analysis name and editable

tooltips.taxid: UniProt taxonomic ID(s) to restrict the BLAST search (comma-separated list, e.g. 6239 for C. elegans). Leave blank to search all species.
tooltips.taxid_file: File containing one taxid per line — alternative to entering them manually
tooltips.evalue: E-value threshold: only BLAST hits better than this cutoff are kept
tooltips.max_hits: Maximum number of BLAST hits to retrieve (default 100)
tooltips.db: UniProt database to search: uniprotkb (all), swissprot (human-curated, smaller), trembl (computationally annotated, largest)
tooltips.length: Minimum hit length as a fraction of your query length — filters out partial matches (0 = no filter)

tooltips.pdb: Path to a local AlphaFold PDB file. Leave blank to search the AlphaFold Database automatically.
tooltips.evalue: E-value cutoff for the BLAST search used to find the matching AlphaFold model
tooltips.percent_id: Minimum % sequence identity required to accept an AlphaFold model as a match
tooltips.existing_AF2: 1 = search AlphaFold DB for an existing prediction; 0 = use the PDB you supplied

tooltips.fasta: Path to the protein FASTA (auto-filled from the sequence input above)
tooltips.sites_file: File of regex patterns defining PTM sites (phosphorylation, ubiquitination, etc.) — defaults to the bundled table

tooltips.fasta: Path to the protein FASTA (auto-filled from the sequence input above)
tooltips.scores_file: TSV file of per-amino-acid property scores (e.g., hydrophobicity) — defaults to the bundled Kyle-Doolittle table
tooltips.window: Sliding window size in residues for averaging the property score (1 = no smoothing)

tooltips.genomic_fasta: FASTA of the genomic region to search (orientation need not be known; run_genewise.py tests both strands automatically)
tooltips.genewise: path to a pre-computed Genewise .out.txt file (leave empty to run Genewise automatically via the EBI REST API)
tooltips.n_guides: maximum guide RNAs to report per insertion site
tooltips.arm_length: homology arm length in bp on each side of insertion
tooltips.PAM: IUPAC PAM sequence (e.g. NGG for SpCas9)
tooltips.cut_offset: bases upstream of PAM where the DSB occurs (SpCas9=3)
